name: Kuzu Tas Kebabi (Stewed Lamb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone the leg of lamb, remove all fat, and cut into 1-1/2 inch cubes.
2. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
3. Add onion to the pot and cook until it turns brown.
4. Add the meat cubes to the pot and brown them lightly.
5. Stir in the tomatoes, peppers (including stems), parsley, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
6. Pour in enough water or broth to cover the ingredients by about an inch.
7. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and let it cook for 2 hours, covered.
8. Stir in the cubed potatoes, green peas, and sliced carrots along with any accumulated liquid.
9. Continue cooking until the potatoes are tender, which should take about 15 minutes.
Each serving contains about: 474 calories; 744 milligrams sodium; 106 milligrams cholesterol; 29 grams fat; 27 grams carbohydrates; 28 grams protein; 1.76 grams fiber.
